prompt: Research Turner Construction for me — size, market focus, and reputation.

score.finalText:
## Turner Construction — size, market focus, reputation

### Public web sources
- **Size:** Turner’s official site says it has **over 16,000 employees** and completes **more than $28 billion** of construction annually across **thousands of projects**. It also says Turner operates in **North America and in 30 countries around the world**. URL: https://www.turnerconstruction.com/who-we-are
- **Company scale corroboration:** Turner’s LinkedIn profile lists **10,001+ employees** and **19,546 employees on LinkedIn**, with **839,270 followers**. URL: https://www.linkedin.com/company/turner-construction-company
- **Market focus:** Turner describes itself as a **North America-based, international construction services company** and says it is a leader in **diverse market segments**. Its market sectors include **aviation & transportation, federal, healthcare, pharmaceutical & biotech, industrial & advanced manufacturing, critical facilities, and sports & entertainment**. Turner also states it is a leader in major segments including **healthcare, education, commercial, sports, aviation, pharmaceutical, retail, and green building**. URL: https://www.turnerconstruction.com/market-sectors
- **Recent sector emphasis:** In a 2025 company update, Turner said leading sectors include **data centers, healthcare, commercial, and education**, with backlog concentrated in **data centers, healthcare, education, and sports/entertainment**. URL: https://www.turnerconstruction.com/insights/turner-construction-company-achieves-historic-growth-in-the-first-half-of-2025
- **Reputation:** Turner’s official site says its reputation was built on **integrity, working safely, delivering complex and challenging projects, and driving innovation**. LinkedIn/Turner also emphasizes recognition for **large, complex projects**, **innovation**, and **emerging technologies**. URLs: https://www.turnerconstruction.com/who-we-are , https://www.linkedin.com/company/turner-construction-company
- **Positioning:** Turner presents itself as the **largest general contractor in the country** on its official site. URL: https://www.turnerconstruction.com/who-we-are

### Alleato internal evidence
- I checked team-memory context for “Turner Construction” and found **no relevant Alleato internal evidence** about this company in the retrieved memories. The only returned items were unrelated team memories, so there is **no internal project/vendor-specific evidence to add**.

### Bottom line
Turner Construction is a **very large, top-tier contractor** with **16k+ employees**, **$28B+ annual volume**, and a broad footprint across North America and internationally. Its strongest market focus is in **complex, high-value verticals**—especially **data centers/critical facilities, healthcare, education, commercial, aviation, and sports/entertainment**. Its reputation is centered on **scale, safety, complex-project delivery, and innovation**.
